display.name: Woodsmoke Bunkhouse
display.short_description: A squat bunkhouse sags beside the road. The hearth is dead, but a whetstone and a half-stuck pay locker still remain.

choices.label: Work the whetstone
choices.summary: Take a careful minute with the old stone and bring your edge back into line.

choices.label: Lift the locker scrip
choices.summary: Pry the locker open and take the stamped road scrip before the roof gives way.
